subject: docs(ai): add prohibition on AskUserQuestion tool + imageCells removal plan
body:
Added absolute rule to CLAUDE.md AI Notes: never use the AskUserQuestion
tool. It breaks the session UI by covering context and getting stuck. List
options as numbered text instead.

Also added plan.md for upcoming imageCells removal work.

Tags: docs, ai-notes, planning
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 5
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: imagecells-removal
Semver: patch

title: add prohibition on AskUserQuestion tool + imageCells removal plan
